title: Delightful Crispy Fish with Poached Vegetables
description: A light and flavorful dish that combines the crispiest fish with the freshest poached vegetables, all tied together with the warmth of coriander.

ingredients.name: Vegetables (such as carrots, green beans and bell peppers)

instructions: Season the cod fillets with salt, pepper and coriander.
Mix Delight and lemon juice to create a marinade.
Coat the cod fillets with the marinade and place on a baking sheet.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
While the fish is baking, bring a pot of water to a boil and poach the vegetables.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Once the fish is done, place it in the pan and crisp up for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Serve the crispy fish with poached vegetables.
